textByHashes.802f7b13673a3a221b939507dfb96e1d6359b944: Welcome to the magnificent wonder of the Observatory, where wonder is all around you, where the stars can be clutched from the heavens!
textByHashes.cb773f7b3101eae5ebc5762551a318176c7a3d45: Why, thanks! How might I help you?
textByHashes.2f109b4751495a948d9eb4bcc305d317c56b3857: Lost? It must have been those pesky goblins that led you astray.
textByHashes.99a14de874c1eb489dd4d9068f96fd1b83434a69: Head north-east to find the city of Ardougne.
textByHashes.80e78d455947b6a94d182e2af4641df479567984: No problem at all. Come and visit again!
textByHashes.d727d5e7dfa27ba953b955a633c0cfea54358a48: Of course. We have a superb telescope up in the Observatory, on the hill.
textByHashes.c7ab6fc654fa437d02b285e009079d5908d74cf7: A truly marvellous invention, the likes of which you'll never behold again.
textByHashes.704bfbc4921b7a35a399d981510f533f2a959037: Oh, no, no, no. Don't listen to him, he's joking. Aren't you, my FAITHFUL assistant?
textByHashes.26fb28c6de83ca891582491b1b5fdf8310e542de: Arghhh! Get back to work and stop sticking your nose in!
textByHashes.2ab5d7ffa172eab3443363bf8fc94f8277581270: Oh, I suppose there's no use keeping it secret. Did you see those houses outside?
textByHashes.9b0ff368b0bf55fa045e2e151bf348e18ec07617: Since they moved here they have caused nothing but trouble.
textByHashes.8f4f02b0fb3876a106d1617bc3eb1ed5a81c4cca: Last week, my telescope was tampered with.
textByHashes.7359977ed529fa7e33edc5de83e9c063e2c25606: Now, parts need replacing before it can be used again. They've even been messing around in the dungeons under this area. Something needs to be done.
textByHashes.7827094ab012765f6eab5e33e9879cacfb2afa52: Although, he has a point. What do you say?
textByHashes.b12bcbc17492b4167ecbcd0591580a869f465461: I shall need some materials for the telescope, so it can be used again.
textByHashes.9adc349aacc9135ea0c336762cf391a9eb09d8e7: Let's start with three planks of wood for the telescope base. My assistant will help with obtaining these, won't you?
textByHashes.9e4cee4725b2d4c3db80c6f49948574212992198: Go talk to him if you need some advice.
textByHashes.081aafd9c76b69e8dff2f3588e51c0f1da16c8b4: Oh dear. I really do need some help.
textByHashes.ada90237eda1f63f3013d6dec6ba5a1213c5c277: If you see anyone who can help then please send them my way.
textByHashes.bd2303ff02e346a2b051e51d2a15d5c12c53e112: Fair enough. Not everyone is interested in this place, I suppose.
textByHashes.60db460a2767e051b96647091d857753ccb67800: It's my helping hand, back again.
textByHashes.a54bd341abb78ad657903cb75dff1ff839ad0fa8: Do you have the planks yet?
textByHashes.1ea20212dcd04db18d81255330348cd9edf363cd: Well, you'll need three of them.
textByHashes.1035fbe4f4086699c6971d9ad3d1e634ee12853c: That's no good. I asked for ordinary planks. If you can't find out where they are, talk to my assistant.
textByHashes.ed61f60b80fc2d2aa7b56699cdd17d28b3e0dd0d: I asked for ordinary wooden planks. If you're not sure where to get them, speak to my assistant.
textByHashes.1547679ed4d461484090591272def47b4e13b3ac: Well done. This will make a big difference.
textByHashes.e012dc12e1feede528bf1e8216d3a1a123981f56: Now, the bronze for the tube. Oh, assistant!
textByHashes.e91cca45d649c44ebe7ff10d7a40477151705fac: What did I tell you about speaking when spoken to?
textByHashes.6d48e0cac6a840bca705150ab7d8bea3dc1d6ee1: So, , you have the bronze bar?
textByHashes.4813a7dc0812622db5aa7d277861b9a2532c4747: Great. Now all I need is the lens made.
textByHashes.beacaf22af7d50be663486a821d8cc54ca1542c1: Please get me some molten glass.
textByHashes.3be0ee62b876845cfd929e809cf21346592cd01a: Not you! I'm talking to my assistant.
textByHashes.0ac41a0044d47b3c8bb3c97027af9e9e9a14de71: Thank you. Wait a minute, who you calling 'old'?
textByHashes.78c2570addb01d8ca66e2b4d9d7f954a1844e2bc: How are you getting on finding me some molten glass?
textByHashes.43544df1dd37ff87a2753adae5e81ac72bfc83dd: I really need it. Please hurry.
textByHashes.1847acf17134cbf7a3db75612b2ee67e028d6e76: Excellent work, let's make the lens.
textByHashes.888392708bbe56c4b1ba7d795f0c5973588d54ad: Well, obviously, hence why we have a lens mould.
textByHashes.a051d0a0c1443fc2659a13f47801313bdfcd3f10: Great, just what I need. , I don't suppose you could find it?
textByHashes.05fe88deaec9433e91600e57b77c5147f10e5dde: No idea. You could ask my USELESS assistant if you want.
textByHashes.f1a7d33a37e03179529936c2e2d0cd25f433d424: Did you bring me the mould?
textByHashes.e62e3a3e0a076d9ef580fa8b6e61f3f9b916d28b: Please try and find it; again, my assistant may be able to help.
textByHashes.b9dd0c693ddfbbfa3801bed2a02029c09d46861b: It doesn't look much like a lens mould.
textByHashes.be342918bc86b1eb3b245e10e7d9a95bdd2457a3: Interesting. You might be onto something there. Keep looking.
textByHashes.29259f16108f8d8719549df99fb145625406d7f2: Well, from the smell I'd guess cooking some vile concoction.
textByHashes.9d79002fa81f9efd453129933726c2989bfd2149: Erm, yes. I think in this instance you had probably better do it.
textByHashes.a67dad4c3de3ad870d2a621db474cec6b38a16d0: You can use the mould with molten glass to make a new lens.
textByHashes.a4a13cac70f16fa1e7d5d130baecc1712f03f9ca: Hurry and free up some space, then.
textByHashes.6ce0f965d68f4180cd7fd16e829a98cc21751de9: Use the molten glass with the mould.
textByHashes.54d9926c40f9e67c8bd493d1297ec51706a51fc0: Wonderful, at last I can fix the telescope.
textByHashes.9f58bf72179e24642df77aa4fc9dbfb9272322fa: Would you accompany me to the Observatory? You simply must see the telescope in operation.
textByHashes.add9f6ef0881ad479d5ee66fa8f153f98e24c8e4: Superb. You'll have to go via the dungeon under the goblin settlement, seeing as the bridge is broken. You'll find stairs up to the Observatory from there.
textByHashes.11545bcd77ba7b89eb88e1eacd7182db9d6e4bb2: I'm just adding the finishing touches.
textByHashes.bff215e03681ef52fd5794c7d64cebeea543f135: , I'm just going upstairs to finish off.
textByHashes.82d6f96c4560ac636ddfde8c72bd0f504c7bdd89: And all our work pays off.
textByHashes.15d179c6e25a8d2d2b30c0edd061a6d5b1137fd7: Certainly is. Please, take a look through the telescope and tell me what you see.
textByHashes.2f05f5df03343864edb51698dcb90f4ebc41f6bf: What did you see? If you're not sure, you can find out by looking at the star charts dotted around the walls downstairs.
textByHashes.f468de71ba0046b5d7069c9b237f5a85da017fa2: It seems suitable, then, to award you with water runes!
textByHashes.4f5b6e1072038f93b30adaef05a6d7c2f07ee5fe: By Saradomin's earlobes! You must be a friend of the gods indeed.
textByHashes.1c9d73420b8e98ce66c2fe179a8380a6ff92d876: Look in your backpack for your reward, in payment for your work.
textByHashes.23443c4ee9ee806411008ceb03e626976ba3af71: Have you got some space for your reward?
textByHashes.6f6f2f5bc83f50c67da953f1cc7e957ebc815103: Come see me again when you have a few free spaces in your inventory.
textByHashes.7d8b0e3a930bbebf7d6459e690e28d87bef5d5b7: I'm afraid not. Have another look. Remember, you can check the star charts on the walls for reference.
textByHashes.75a64a10713004822a200a6f91d7ab18b214f8f2: Capricorn will surely reward your insight with an increase to your Strength.
textByHashes.61a21289d3d486019ea723d74562677f0000656c: As you've spotted the archer, I shall reward you with a maple longbow.
textByHashes.94f922939e6811ffdcf3ecd75ee2204300501c84: I think weapon poison would make a suitable reward.
textByHashes.60b647855788c7ecf547921a9e55926cd3bf0e35: Hmmm, balance, law, order - I shall award you with law runes!
textByHashes.14d39dc9f6c172cbb5d1a8476ea6859d13591fd4: Virgo will surely provide you with an increase to Defence.
textByHashes.8c503380dc34828cb352efc4762fdc3b8e0f7045: I think the majestic power of the lion will raise your Hitpoints.
textByHashes.b2de19f5845f9ebc5049950afef242d689af63bf: An armoured creature - I think I shall reward you with an amulet of protection.
textByHashes.8a82d95f49518cb2b3c8f9cd5e96bf5a0d22eb96: With the double nature of Gemini, I can't offer you anything more suitable than a two-handed weapon.
textByHashes.e03b31770b94051da91e3d9016debcc4a0dfb673: This Strength potion should be a suitable reward.
textByHashes.fbed0184dd0d5d96a0f8ee18adf53c769279916e: A fierce fighter. I'm sure he'll look down on you and improve your Attack for such insight.
textByHashes.d1c18e052c6c39515af544116f676f9ab6d69e0d: What's more suitable as a reward than some tuna?
textByHashes.ebb9e020a15ec97666b36828912bea5a9437ee0c: Welcome back! How can I help you today?
textByHashes.d89d5ed14f334e0477812c0b8be5dbd6f909bd58: Ah, I get asked about treasure trails all the time! Listen carefully and I shall tell you what I know...
textByHashes.bd25bc601265033c08cde5799c0fe87fd1352e6c: Lots of clues have degrees and minutes written on them. These are the coordinates of the place where the treasure is buried.
textByHashes.833147930593c3bf1678f6fa6c08fab79041d3d2: You have to walk to the correct spot, so that your coordinates are exactly the same as the values written on the clue scroll.
textByHashes.5c3ca33e73853cc19ba9b8e6a5cc56f38998a21b: To do this, you must use a sextant, a watch and a chart to find your own coordinates.
textByHashes.5c0bc33a3b40a282e17975eef4920fc58754ab9d: Once you know the coordinates of the place where you are, you know which way you have to walk to get to the place where the treasure is!
textByHashes.55fad9e2ddac8e62e019ecb85fd7e7adb15f3dd1: I think Murphy, the owner of the fishing trawler moored south of Ardougne, might be able to spare you a sextant. Then the nearest Clock Tower is south of Ardougne - you could probably get a watch there. I've
textByHashes.b0a49861c36033801e728f195f59c29120c8401f: got plenty of charts myself, here have one.
textByHashes.2c2c60dfa3e660ad4aabb99dca3bd9b78263139e: You don't have enough space for the chart. Come back to me when you do.
textByHashes.282134cac21bef7a90121f721079aca16384cd23: Um... Are you sure? I think you've got one stored somewhere.
textByHashes.818efb73ca639ec5fb369645204babec7790ffc9: That's not a problem, I've got lots of copies.
textByHashes.94df3e65092c1e305523bf7a7afb4de666ed7cd1: Thanks for all your help with the telescope. What can I do for you?
textByHashes.1fa0a1a74eb372c5f29172ec41b020c35aa396a7: but the stars may hold a secret for you.
textByHashes.fd35b73638e5e709d04ff61045ea6a2d824f7d29: I mean, of course not, what a silly idea.
textByHashes.a336d4867f57c00273b6fd0f2bfa944942c4c7b7: Okay, no problem. See you again.
textByHashes.dfcd42c014f860f62bf93087e42acb1ae0bcc35d: Scorpius, the founder of all we know relating to astronomy. There's a book about him in the reception. Perhaps you should check it out, you might learn something.
textByHashes.e95bbedd1fe0336d4082c9d00b421948573700ee: Wonderful. You must be very proud to have it.
textByHashes.557c6ab6eb6ebc9bc6b3dc437b13e4719ccc4ae7: I'd rather you show me the actual item, as opposed to the note form.
